title: blairia javanica
intro: Blairia javanica, also known as Java tea or Java tea plant, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Blairia javanica include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Blairia javanica is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
